summary: Comprehensive testing of Click Agenda scheduling platform completed. Backend API tests achieved 95% success rate. Frontend/UI tests passed for all major flows including authentication, dashboard, CRUD operations, and navigation. One minor issue found in public booking flow authentication.

minor_bugs.issue: Public booking flow attempting to book already reserved time slot returns 409 conflict (expected behavior but needs better slot availability checking)
minor_bugs.impact: Users may see conflicts during public booking

ui_bugs.issue: Public booking page (/p/{slug}/agendar) redirects to login unexpectedly, suggesting authentication issue with public endpoints

integration_issues.issue: 401 errors in console when accessing public booking flow, may indicate auth token requirements for public endpoints

issues: Minor console warnings about missing DialogContent descriptions

passed_tests: Settings page with tabs (Profile, Availability, Public)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix public booking flow authentication issue - public booking pages should not require authentication or redirect to login. Investigate 401 errors in public booking endpoints and ensure proper separation between public and authenticated routes.
